3208060.name: Hooked On Speed
3208060.description:
Get ready to test your reflexes and racing instincts in Hooked On Speed! In this adrenaline-pumping action game, your goal is simple: collect all checkpoints to finish the level as fast as possible. Each of the 24 meticulously designed levels challenges your speed, precision, and strategic use of power-ups.

Use speedboosts to rocket through straightaways, jumpboosts to soar over obstacles, and timestop to navigate through tricky situations. But it’s not just about reaching the finish line—unlock medals by beating each level with record times. Can you achieve bronze, silver, and gold? And for the ultimate test, try to earn the elusive Author medal, representing the developer's personal best time.

Race against the clock, break your own records, and get Hooked On Speed!
